title: Hooks Project
description: React data hooks for **Hooks Project**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.
context: React data hooks for **Hooks Project**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.

rules: The hook surface MUST call `client:port-project` methods `getProject()` and `getProjectStatus()` and return `{ data, error, isLoading, refetch }` (or equivalent) to consumers.

rules.requirement: hooks participate in the global project poll
rules: While the shell global poll runs, these hooks MUST refresh project and project status on the 2–3 second interval.
Parallel mounts MUST share one in-flight request per cache key to avoid stampedes.

scenarios.name: getProjectStatus returns status DTO
then: counts and graph flags available to UI

scenarios.name: Hooks expose loading and error tuple

scenarios.requirement: hooks participate in the global project poll
scenarios.name: Project hooks refetch on global poll

scenarios.requirement: hooks participate in the global project poll
scenarios.name: Poll shares dedupe cache with manual refresh
when: user triggers manual refresh during poll

scenarios.requirement: hooks participate in the global project poll
scenarios.name: Blur pauses project poll
then: AND stale banner may show until focus

scenarios.name: Parallel mounts share in-flight request
when: two components mount same hook key

scenarios.name: Cache key separates changes
when: hooks for change a and b mount

scenarios.name: Unmount does not cancel shared in-flight
given: request still needed by sibling mount
